title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Reiju, Unknown person #8 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Judge, it is time to start heading towards the whole cake chateau!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've completed all of the preparations for your departure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Alright. Inform the children as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It'll sting for a bit, alright?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just hurry up and put it on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ugh! You weren't kidding, this really...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aghhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Augh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You can't touch it, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ahh-... ah?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My face is back to normal.... OW!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That face mask only prevents your face from S. swelling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means it simply interferes with your bodys natural healing process,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So it'll still be sensitive to the touch and won't repair itself until it's removed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm sure you much prefer this any day over showing up looking like some blowfish.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the Charlotte family, last names remain unchanged even after marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But as long as the bride takes a liking to you, you'll be able to live out the remainder of your life in a joyous bliss!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have no one to blame but yourself... I told you not to come back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the extent of the help you'll be getting from me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've already told you... that there are no second chances around here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyways, I've been meaning to ask... this "chivalry" of yours... where did you pick it up from?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Quit yer yammering!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not another peep out of any of you! We don't need no stinkin' female cook in here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I train all of you imbeciles with my kicks... but I ain't subjecting no woman to that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why? If she doesn't get something,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just knock some sense into her like you do us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Men aren't meant to kick women, ya that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's an iron- clad rule of this universe since before the time of dinosaurs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen... I don't give a damn how many times you fuck up as a human being...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if you end up screwing up as a man... Well, if that day ever comes, I'll be there to personally slice your damn balls off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hell, I'll slit myself in the throat while I'm at it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?! Why?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: you'd go that far...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's my duty...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's what it means to be your damn parent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fool...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare grow into some asshole I'll come to despise!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now hurry up and get back to work!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I'm just following the rules of this universe since before the time of dinosaurs.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Lord Sanji... We will be departing shortly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a lot of fun, but I'm not sure if I can't

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The time has come for the engagement gift exchange!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Have a safe trip!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We send our best regards and well wishes to you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lord Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Break a leg!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Meeww...

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
